lowMatchEntries.ourDef: a big bird that honks and lives near water
a very large bird that flies high
lowMatchEntries.dictDef: Any of several large carnivorous and carrion-eating birds in the family Accipitridae, having a powerful hooked bill and keen vision.

lowMatchEntries.ourDef: a large ocean animal with sharp teeth
lowMatchEntries.dictDef: A scaleless, predatory fish of the superorder Selachimorpha, with a cartilaginous skeleton and 5 to 7 gill slits on each side of its head.

lowMatchEntries.ourDef: a small bumpy animal that hops and lives on land
lowMatchEntries.dictDef: To expel (a user) permanently from a MUD or similar system, so that their account is deleted.

lowMatchEntries.ourDef: a small food that grows in a shell in the ground
a thick hot meal of meat and vegetables cooked slowly in a pot
a special food or small gift that makes you happy
lowMatchEntries.dictDef: An entertainment, outing, food, drink, or other indulgence provided by someone for the enjoyment of others.

lowMatchEntries.ourDef: the inside of your neck where food and air pass
lowMatchEntries.dictDef: The front part of the neck.
